hero.headline: Ignite Your Brand. Elevate Your Story.
hero.subheadline: Luxe Ignite Style is a full-service digital content creation agency — architecting brands, studios, and products that captivate, convert, and endure.

about.headline: Where Vision Meets Execution
about.body: Luxe Ignite Style sits at the apex of a three-tier creative ecosystem. We conceive, fund, and guide the studios and products beneath us — ensuring every brand we touch carries the same standard of craft, warmth, and intention.

hierarchy.headline: Three Tiers. One Vision.
hierarchy.description: Every great empire is built on clear structure. Ours is no different — from agency strategy down to the products your audience loves.

tiers.name: Luxe Ignite Style
tiers.description: The strategic command centre. We set direction, manage brand standards, and oversee all studio operations and product launches.

tiers.name: Cognitive0Creations
tiers.description: The creative engine. Responsible for producing EBooks, apps, digital tools, and all content products across the portfolio.

tiers.name: MindBloom
tiers.description: Our current main project — a cozy mental wellness app guided by Blaze, your AI fox companion. Everything you need to feel good.

events.headline: Events & Activities
events.description: From product launches to community workshops — stay in the loop with everything happening across the Luxe Ignite Style ecosystem.

items.title: MindBloom Beta — Now Live!
items.description: MindBloom launched on Google Play at the end of June. Download free and meet Blaze, your AI fox companion.

items.title: Cognitive0Creations Creator Workshop
items.description: A free online workshop on digital content creation — EBooks, apps, and brand building.

items.title: Luxe Ignite Style Brand Reveal
items.description: Full agency brand reveal including new studio partnerships and upcoming product roadmap.

connect.headline: Let's Build Something Extraordinary
connect.body: Whether you're a creator, collaborator, or curious fan — we'd love to hear from you.
